violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3 bay sink to sanitize all dishes until machine is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The kitchen hood vents were observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
